case_title: NICOLE M. GINOCCHIO VS. GE SAN RAFAEL GROUP, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GINOCCHIO, NICOLE M. AS TO DEFENDANT GE SAN RAFAEL GROUP, A NEVADA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA GREAT EXPECTATIONS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
